data.general: This period may bring moderate personal growth as Sun and Jupiter are in the 10th house, influencing career prospects. With Moon in the 12th house, emotions may be a bit subdued, but this can also lead to increased intuition and inner strength. Be cautious of health issues due to Mars in the 8th house.
data.luck: As Mars is in the 8th house, there might be some financial setbacks, but with proper management, you can recover quickly. Mercury's presence in the 9th house suggests that your communication skills will be valuable in achieving your goals.
data.scope: With Rahu in the 5th house, your creativity and intellectual pursuits may receive a boost. However, be aware of potential distractions that can hinder your focus. Saturn in the 6th house indicates a need for discipline and hard work to achieve your objectives.
data.study: Jupiter's presence in the 10th house indicates a favorable time for career advancement and recognition. Focus on developing skills that align with your profession to capitalize on this opportunity. Rahu in the 5th house can bring innovative ideas, but be cautious of procrastination.
data.love: Venus in the 11th house suggests a need for independence in your relationships. Be open to new connections and friendships that can bring joy and support into your life. With Ketu in the 11th house, there may be some emotional distance in your relationships, but this can also help you develop emotional resilience.
data.travel: With Mercury in the 9th house, you may have opportunities to travel or explore new places for work or leisure. Be prepared for unexpected changes in your travel plans. Rahu in the 5th house can bring excitement and adventure, but also be mindful of your safety and well-being.
